title: Pinalia ovata
taxonomy: Pinalia ovata is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Pinalia is part of the subtribe Aeridinae within the tribe Aerideae. This classification indicates the plant's evolutionary relationships and its position within the broader orchid family. Further research may provide more detailed information on its classification.
